codeReview.summary: The feature now satisfies its contract in the current post-fix repository state. The shared-field regression exercises representative supported families and the document-level count regression covers the prioritized entity set. The original WIPEOUT geometry gap that made the earlier count/common-field coverage insufficient is addressed by the follow-up fix in commit 310ed76, which adds payload-level WIPEOUT assertions and corrects reverse bridging to preserve local clip vertices.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The dxf-bridge-worker skill still tells workers to trust the manifest command from services.yaml after verifying workspace layout, but bridge features in this mission repeatedly had to use `cargo test --bin H7CAD native_bridge -- --test-threads=16` because the contract text and older command forms referring to `--lib native_bridge` are stale for this workspace layout.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill: D:/work/plant-code/cad/H7CAD/.factory/skills/dxf-bridge-worker/SKILL.md; services: D:/work/plant-code/cad/H7CAD/.factory/services.yaml defines `test_bridge`; transcript skeletons in C:/Users/Administrator/.factory/missions/987bf88e-9101-4702-b6df-71e03b19d518/worker-transcripts.jsonl show workers encountering and compensating for stale manifest assumptions.

summary: Reviewed the original feature commit c77ab7d together with the current src/io/native_bridge.rs state and the follow-up WIPEOUT fix commit 310ed76. No blocking or non-blocking code issues remain for this feature in the post-fix repository state; the requested scrutiny report was regenerated from current evidence rather than stale artifacts.
